creator: n_hibma@qubesoft.com
text:
The QDraw 3D library provides platform independent hardware accelerated
3D graphics through a well defined API. It runs on Linux, FreeBSD,
Windows 98, Windows 2000, and on PlayStation 2.

WWW: http://www.qubesoft.com


It might be that I have submitted this PR before (I could not find it, so I presume that the message
got dropped somewhere), but if so, this one has changed and is the 
correct version.

How-To-Repeat: rm -rf /usr/ports/graphics/qdraw
